items.title: Entity delete fail after trail change
items.summary:
When I test three trails, after two nic_card tests and entering the blue port insertation, it happens that the gripper is stuck in the air and the position seems to be near the nic card in the previous trail.

I guess that the entity is not deleted, although there is no any nic card shown in the gazebo sim.

RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands
items.summary:
RLWRLD said with RLDX-1, it aimed to include things like context memorization or force sensing, which existing models often lack.

The post RLWRLD releases RLDX-1, a dexterity-first foundation model for robot hands appear
